meaning: united front (abbr. for 統一戰線|统一战线[tong3 yi1 zhan4 xian4])
sentence: 统战工作要注重与各方建立信任。
pinyin: Tǒng zhàn gōng zuò yào zhù zhòng yǔ gè fāng jiàn lì xìn rèn.
english: United front work must focus on building trust with all parties.

meaning: to reform; to rectify and improve
sentence: 检查发现问题后，工厂立刻开始整改。
pinyin: Jiǎn chá fā xiàn wèn tí hòu, gōng chǎng lì kè kāi shǐ zhěng gǎi.
english: After the inspection found problems, the factory immediately began rectifying them.

sentence: 评审委员与参赛方有利益冲突，应该回避。
pinyin: Píng shěn wěi yuán yǔ cān sài fāng yǒu lì yì chōng tū, yīng gāi huí bì.
english: The judge has a conflict of interest with one of the contestants and should recuse themselves.

meaning: to lift oneself out of poverty
sentence: 经过多年努力，这个村子终于脱贫了。
pinyin: Jīng guò duō nián nǔ lì, zhè gè cūn zi zhōng yú tuō pín le.
english: After years of hard work, this village has finally lifted itself out of poverty.

meaning: big head; mask in the shape of a big head; the larger end of sth; the
sentence: 这笔开销的大头是租金，其他费用不多。
pinyin: Zhè bǐ kāi xiāo de dà tóu shì zū jīn, qí tā fèi yòng bù duō.
english: The main chunk of this expense is rent; the other costs are small.
